titles_tesim: Synaxarium for whole year [Sunaksarin, teksa d yawnaye (Brock)]
contents_tesim: Synaxarium for whole year [Sunaksarin, teksa d yawnaye (Brock)]
full_text_tesim: Geometric and vegetal decorated roundels, palmettes and crosses throughout ff. 9v-131r; f. 19r, bordered roundel, with red and green ink; f. 44v, Star of David, green and red

Geometric headpieces throughout, f. 3r, ff. 153v-236r; ff. 173v, 211v, 219r, bordered with decorated tail ends; f. 192r, repeating arch, red and black ink; ff. 201v, 211v, radiating and repeating chevron motif; f. 224r, repeating heart motif with decorated tail ends, red and black ink
